---
title: "My First Blog Post"
date: "2024-01-01"
categories: [general, eng]
tags: [introduction, quarto]
description: "My first blog post on the new website"
image: "immagini\\monte_rosa_0284.jpg" # optional
---

# Welcome to My Blog

This is my first blog post using Quarto.

## Getting Started

Quarto makes it easy to create beautiful websites.

## Code Example
